name: w1-agentic-handoff
title: W1 agentic handoff upgrade: two-phase generateHandoffFlow (drafting tool loop + self-review) replacing the one-shot prefetch
description: Rewrite generateHandoffFlow from deterministic prefetch + one mini-model call into a two-phase agent. Phase 1: gpt-4o tool loop (tool_choice auto, max 4 rounds) over read-only tools (listRelatedCommits, getCommitDiff NEW, searchDiscordMessages, searchPastCommits, readRepoPlanningDocs, readTeamState) terminating in draftHandoff(markdown). Phase 2: gpt-4o-mini reviewer (zod {score 1-5, gaps[]}) judging the draft against the task's acceptanceCriteria + description; score>=4 finalizes, score<4 with total rounds<5 re-injects gaps and loops back to Phase 1, hard stop at total rounds 5 forces draftHandoff. Add a minimal githubClient diff method (per-file patch, truncated ~3000 tokens/commit). Preserve cache semantics (force flag), onTaskUpdated best-effort trigger path, and result shape {handoffMarkdown, cached}. Persist review metadata (rounds, score) on the task doc.
creator: gitsync
notes: IMPLEMENTED (Q1-Q6 all RESOLVED in prd.md). Two-phase agentic generateHandoffFlow: Phase 1 gpt-4o tool loop (listRelatedCommits/getCommitDiff NEW/searchDiscordMessages/searchPastCommits/readRepoPlanningDocs/readTeamState + draftHandoff terminal), Phase 2 gpt-4o-mini reviewer (HandoffReviewSchema {score,gaps}) re-injecting gaps into the shared thread. NEW githubClient.getCommitDiff (per-file patch, truncated 12000 chars; getCommit untouched). NEW tools/handoffTools.ts. resolveRepoContext exported from repoDocs.ts (Q2, no dup). handoffReview={score,rounds,generatedAt} persisted best-effort. Cache/force semantics + result shape + onTaskUpdated trigger path unchanged. Gates green: typecheck 0, jest 34 suites/258 tests (was 33/250, all baseline preserved), lint 0. Orchestrator to close. Merge note: generateHandoff.ts + prompts/generateHandoff.ts are W3 touch points (projectBrief context prefix) — coordinate before merge.

meta.baseline: typecheck 0 errors; jest 33 suites / 250 tests green
meta.result: typecheck 0 errors; jest 34 suites / 258 tests green; lint 0 errors
